mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('CONVERT_LOG_SEQUENCE')
INSERT INTO CONVERT_LOG ( CONVERT_LOG_ID, OBJECT_ID, PATH_NM, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, RESULT_CODE, USER_ID, CONVERT_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{CONVERT_LOG_ID}, #{OBJECT_ID}, #{PATH_NM}, #{ORG_FILE_NM}, #{FILE_SIZE}, #{RESULT_CODE}, #{USER_ID}, #{CONVERT_TYPE} )
